ol.li: Pattern Matching: Guarantees that pattern matching on Join (Step 6) sees already-simplified Filter nodes (Step 4).
Modified Signal: Any rule application that changes the node topology (modified=True) forces the recursive parent to update its child pointers.

Complexity:
Worst Case: $O(Rules \times Nodes^2)$
Average Case: $O(Rules \times Nodes)$
Memory Management: PlanNodes use shared_ptr for child management to avoid dangling refs during tree mutation.

g.text: Bottom-up tree traversal: children processed before parent. Implementation-grade spec.

text.tspan: # If a child changed, replace and re-evaluate
# 2. Apply rule to CURRENT node after children stabilize
# 3. No modification in this subtree level
# If a child changed, replace and re-evaluate
# 2. Apply rule to CURRENT node after children stabilize
# 3. No modification in this subtree level
